summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Registrations page with 6 registration categories and Leadership page name update. Backend API fully functional, frontend loads correctly, but modal interaction issues found.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepts pointer events preventing form field interactions
ui_bugs.details: Dialog overlay issues prevent users from easily interacting with registration form fields. Modal opens but form inputs are blocked by overlay.

passed_tests: All 6 backend registration endpoints (child, youth, adult, institution, business-training, volunteer)
Registrations navigation link positioned correctly between Media and Contact
Registrations page loads at /registrations URL with correct content
All 6 registration category cards display properly
Leadership page name updated to 'Mr. Ravi Raman' (from Ravichandren Raman)
Backend integration working - tested via API calls
Form validation working for invalid data
Contact, membership inquiry, and newsletter endpoints working
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal overlay issues in registration forms - dialog overlay is intercepting pointer events preventing users from interacting with form fields. Consider adjusting z-index, modal backdrop behavior, or dialog component configuration.
